Tag-count sandbox

Real theme CSS + real Nielsen data from project-ikea2. Flip the options and watch the same sidebar re-render.

Count mode
Tentative digit (mode B)
Group TOTAL row
Appearance
The three states (mode B):
· accepted ≥ 1 → bold digit + two-tone bar
· accepted 0, proposed ≥ 1 → muted digit + pale bar
· both 0 → nothing (clean blank)

Only jargon barrier and risky default have an accepted tag in this project; everything else is AutoCode proposals awaiting review.
Quotes ▸ tag filter sidebar
